steps.assistant_text: Splat symbol-boundary / inter-fn-pad class. Single-call leaf `gl_func_00000000();` (jal resolves to addr 0 = raw 0C000000). Body byte-exact at -O2 (0x20: prologue + jal + delay nop + epilogue + jr-ra delay nop). It had been kept INCLUDE_ASM ('route b' 2026-06-10) because a 1-word all-zero ROM pad sat after it (at 0x67390) with no emission host and the .s had FOLDED that pad into a 0x24 symbol. Dewrapped: trimmed the folded pad back out of gl_func_00067370.s (0x24->0x20, so the function ends in the natural jr-ra;nop epilogue) and re-supplied the inter-fn pad word via SUFFIX_BYTES_FORCE (sanctioned all-zero data pad; FORCE for the natural epilogue). Symmetric across decomp + INCLUDE_ASM-baseline. Verified vs INCLUDE_ASM baseline (refresh-expected-baseline.py): 100.0 + clean-build ROM byte-identical.

metadata.compiler_flags: -O2 -G 0 -mips2 -32 -non_shared -Xcpluscomm -Wab,-r4300_mul; gl_func_00067370.s folded-pad trimmed (0x24->0x20); SUFFIX_BYTES_FORCE one all-zero inter-fn pad word
metadata.verification: clean-build ROM byte-identical + objdiff fuzzy=100 vs INCLUDE_ASM baseline
